case_title: MCGAHAN, DUSTIN vs. RODRIQUEZ, JOEL LORENZANA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGAHAN, DUSTIN AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIQUEZ, JOEL LORENZANA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-19-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-18-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-02-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-26-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-19-1997, CONTINUED TO SEP-19-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1 SANCTIONS OF $200 IMPOSED ON PLFF'S ATTY JOHN E JONES FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR ON 8/26/97, PAYABLE 9/10/97. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGAHAN, DUSTIN

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-19-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO PAY SANCTIONS IF NOT PAID BY 9-10-97. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY JOHN E JONES HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGAHAN, DUSTIN

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-29-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AGAINST DEFT. TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY JOHN E JONES. HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE OSC FOR 1/21/98 IS WHY SANCTIONS HAS NOT BEEN PAID OR CASE DISMISSED. PLTF'S ATTY, JOHN E JONES, TO FILE A NEW STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-21-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY ALL SANCTIONS IMPOSED, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-06-1998 CONTINUED FROM JAN-21-1998 TO MAR-18-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCGAHAN, DUSTIN
